nodes.name: Cassin's honeybird
nodes.summary: Cassin's honeybird (Prodotiscus insignis), also known as Cassin's honeyguide, is a species of bird in the family Indicatoridae. Range Its range extends across the African tropical rainforest (also overlapping the Dahomey Gap). References

nodes.name: Prodotiscus
nodes.summary: Prodotiscus（Prodotiscus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Cassin's honeybird、Green-backed honeybird、Brown-backed honeybird。
